text:
On Sat, 14 Mar 2009 13:20:17 UT
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of audio/gimmix,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/132623 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/132623
> 

MMh I have submitted the patch but maybe with a typo in the address
form. So, as I am the maintainer, i auto-approve this patch :)

Thanks,
